name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.12 completes the reference-tree propagation: countAlive, findRetainers, verifyFix all gain optional ref-tree integration so the agent chain `analyzeAbandonedMemory -> findRetainers -> countAlive -> verifyFix` works end-to-end on leakCount=0 memgraphs. verifyFix produces a real PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL verdict with verdictSource=abandoned-memory + freedClasses[] when the cycle-pattern path finds nothing. analyzeHangs gains auto cross-schema correlation: includeStackClassification=true exports time-profile alongside potential-hangs and auto-populates mainThreadViolations[]. v1.11 added inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs ref-tree, CLI abandoned-memory mini-table. v1.10 closed the notelet retro feedback loop. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 35 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 5 investigation prompts.
